examples: By then, he was chewing a fancily wrapped bubble gum.
I had not seen my nephew for a long time. By then, he was chewing a fancily wrapped bubble gum.
I didn't have my hair fancily done or even a pretty dress, but I learned how to feel truly beautiful to be loved.
However, the pay-to-win model is just a fancily-dressed form of game-sanctioned cheating.
